market_overview: High-velocity rotation is currently dominating the Shariah universe. Semiconductor giants are undergoing massive re-ratings following strategic de-risking, while the Data Centre thematic continues to fuel multibillion-ringgit order book expansions in the construction sector.

top_picks.name: INARI
top_picks.analysis: Inari has surged 13.19% on 2.77x relative volume, crushing the RM1.80 barrier. News of the Lumileds termination is seen as a strategic positive for future margins.

deep_dive.thesis: Re-rating event. Removing the Lumileds earnings overhang allows the market to value Inari based on its core RF chip strength.

top_picks.name: IJM
top_picks.analysis: Secured RM658m Hyperscale Data Centre contract. Order book hits RM9.1b with 43% focus on digital infrastructure.

deep_dive.thesis: Premier proxy for the Data Centre boom. Sunway offer rejection at RM3.15 confirms internal valuation is much higher.

top_picks.name: GBGAQRS
top_picks.analysis: Bottom-reversal pattern detected. Project handovers (LRT3) expected to improve balance sheet liquidity in mid-2026.

deep_dive.thesis: Laggard value play. Completion of legacy high-risk infrastructure projects reduces overall risk profile.

top_picks.name: FRONTKN
top_picks.analysis: Benefiting from Inari rally spillover. Technicals show steady accumulation on healthy 1.6x volume.

deep_dive.thesis: Foundry service play. Higher utilization in Taiwan and Singapore chips factories is driving recurring cleaning revenue.

top_picks.name: 99SMART
top_picks.analysis: Defending support levels. Sticky retail demand for grocery staples remains the primary defensive buffer.

deep_dive.thesis: Recession-proof retail. Store network expansion to 3,000 units provides a clear growth roadmap through 2027.
